response.original_title: Can you send money internationally with zelle
response.overview: Can you send money internationally with zelle Currently, +1 (844) 449-2776 (Hotline) you cannot send money internationally using the Zelle network as it is strictly for domestic U.S. transfers. Both the +1 (844) 449-2776 (Hotline) sender and the recipient must have bank accounts based in the United States and use U.S. mobile numbers.
